artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for task 27: 3 phases completed, 9 documentation misalignments resolved across TODO.md, state.json, and ROADMAP.md

completion_data.completion_summary: Fixed 4 critical TODO.md status markers (tasks 12, 15, 17, 18), updated state.json descriptions for tasks 2/3/6-11 replacing stale Temporal paths with Bimodal, updated task 12 description to reflect current PR strategy, and updated ROADMAP.md Wave 1 to remove completed tasks and add task 27.

memory_candidates.content: After large multi-task restructuring sprints (e.g., modular factoring), TODO.md status markers can drift from state.json. Pattern: grep for [RESEARCHING] in TODO.md and compare against state.json statuses to detect bulk mismatches. Fix order: state.json is source of truth, update TODO.md to match. Also check state.json description fields for stale path references that weren't updated during restructuring.
